pages.title: Placing Importers
pages.text: $(bold)Step 1$(): Enter CM dimension (right-click CM with Personal Shrinking Device)$(br2)$(bold)Step 2$(): Identify where resources need to enter $(li)Next to furnace input slots $(li)Next to machine input sides$(br2)$(bold)Step 3$(): Place Importer block$(br2)$(bold)Step 4$() (Optional): Name the Importer using frequency system $(li)Hold an item (e.g., Coal) $(li)Right-click the Importer $(li)Importer now shows as "Coal Importer" in GUIs$(br2)$(bold)Example (With Intermediate Chest - Recommended)$(): [Importer "Coal"] → [Chest] → [Hopper / Pipe] → [Furnace fuel slot] [Importer "Iron Ore"] → [Chest] → [Hopper / Pipe] → [Furnace input slot] $(italic)Using intermediate chests + hoppers/pipes creates more reliable, better-behaved systems.$()

pages.title: Placing Exporters
pages.text: $(bold)Step 1$(): Enter CM dimension$(br2)$(bold)Step 2$(): Identify where products exit $(li)Next to furnace output slots $(li)Next to machine output sides$(br2)$(bold)Step 3$(): Place Exporter block next to the output$(br2)$(bold)Step 4$() (Optional): Name the Exporter using frequency system $(li)Hold an item (e.g., Iron Ingot) $(li)Right-click the Exporter $(li)Exporter now shows as "Iron Ingot Exporter" in GUIs$(br2)$(bold)Example (With Intermediate Chest - Recommended)$(): [Furnace output] → [Hopper / Pipe] → [Chest] → [Exporter "Iron Ingots"] [Crusher output] → [Hopper / Pipe] → [Chest] → [Exporter "Crushed Ore"] $(italic)Using hoppers/pipes + intermediate chests creates more reliable, better-behaved systems.$()
